---
title: "Data Clean"
author: "Chandler Grote"
date: "2024-11-10"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(broom)
library(GGally)
library(tidyr)
library(tidymodels) 
library(kknn)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggh4x)
```

## Clean each tracking week to only presnap events
```{r}
# only need to run once
for (i in c(1:9)){
  file_name <- paste0("data/tracking_week_", i, ".csv")
  
  temp <- read.csv(file_name)
  
  temp <- temp %>%   filter(frameType=="BEFORE_SNAP", !is.na(event))

  write.csv(temp, paste0("data/presnap_events_week_", i, ".csv"), row.names = F)
}
```
